ksa_text: Skill in designing comprehensive AI test plans covering functional performance, fairness, robustness, safety, and operational requirements, with defined pass/fail criteria for each dimension.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these will apply to specific items of supply (i.e., elements and processes).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Risk Management is a primary or secondary domain for the Director of Data Governance. This skill KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (director).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Risk Management), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.518). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Director of Data Governance versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: ISO 31000, NIST RMF, and enterprise risk management frameworks confirm risk management competencies for senior data leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Risk Management appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Director of Data Governance.

decision_rationale: Risk Management skill KSA is within scope for the Director of Data Governance at the director tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
